top_findings.summary: The skill description reveals that reminders are delivered to a hardcoded Telegram chat ID (5028608085) without user consent or configuration option. This violates privacy principles by automatically transmitting user reminder data to a third-party service (Telegram) and a specific recipient without disclosure in the main skill documentation (SKILL.md mentions only local logging). For a reminder skill claiming to work "locally" without external APIs, this hidden external data transmission constitutes privacy overreach.
